fixes.origin:
String query =
                "SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = '" + username + "' AND password = '" + password + "'";
fixes.replacement: String query = "SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ? AND password = ?";

fixes.origin:
String query =
                "SELECT name FROM employees WHERE department = '" + department + "'";
fixes.replacement: String query = "SELECT name FROM employees WHERE department = ?";

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "query" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
